channel.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Internet & Networking

  • Falkon - QtWebEngine based cross-platform web browser 📌.
  • KMail - KMail is the email component of Kontact, the integrated personal information manager from KDE 📌.
  • KDE Connect - A project to communicate across all your devices: receive your phone notifications on your desktop computer, control your desktop from your phone, etc 📌.
  • Smb4K - Advanced Network Neighborhood Browser and Samba Share Mounting Utility 📌.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • KWave - A sound editor built on the KDE Frameworks 5 📌.

    • Applications

    System Administration

  • KDiskFree - Displays the available file devices (hard drive partitions, drives, etc.) along with information on their capacity, free space, type and mount point 📌.
  • KInfoCenter - A utility that provides detailed information about a computer system 📌.
  • Kup - A backup scheduler for KDE's Plasma desktop 📌.

    • Applications

    Utilities & Tools

  • KWinFT - Wayland compositor and X11 window manager.

    • Customization

    Extensions

  • Kvantumstars858 - An SVG-based theme engine for Qt4/Qt5, KDE and LXQt, with an emphasis on elegance, usability and practicality.

    • Customization

    KCM Modules and Systems

  • kde-gtk-config - GTK2 and GTK3 Configurator for KDE 📌.
  • kcm-wacomtablet - KDE GUI for the Wacom Linux Drivers 📌.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Documentation

  • KDE Configsstars136 - List of KDE configuration files and more.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Customization

Extensions

  • Dynamic Wallpaper Enginestars139 - A wallpaper plugin that continuously updates the desktop background based on the current time in your location.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Customization

Themes

  • ChromeOSstars73 - A materia Design theme for KDE Plasma desktop.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
Customization

Extensions

  • Window Title Appletstars143 - Plasma 5 applet that shows the current window title and icon in your panels.
  • Hopplastars35 - KDE Plasma desktop widget to control Philips Hue lights.
  • Places Widgetstars6 - Plasma 5 widget that gives access to user places.
  • Window AppMenu Appletstars246 - Plasma 5 applet in order to show the window appmenu.

    • Customization

    Icons

  • Flaterystars164 - Icon theme for Linux in flat style.
  • Candystars369 - Sweet gradient icons.
  • La Capitainestars1.8k - Icon pack with inspiration taken from the latest iterations of macOS and Google's Material Design.
  • Telastars717 - A flat colorful Design icon theme.

    • Customization

    Display Manager

  • Sugar Candy - The sweetest login theme available for the SDDM display manager.
  • Chilistars116 - The hottest login theme around for KDE Plasma 5.
  • Deliciousstars69 - A delicious SDDM theme for DE collectors/addicts.

    • Applications

    Office & Productivity

  • Kronometer A stopwatch application for KDE 📌.
  • RSIBreak - RSIBreak can be used to remind you to take a break now and then 📌.

    • Applications

    Utilities & Tools

  • Wacom GUIstars67 - Python/PyQt Wacom GUI for KDE.
  • Yin-Yangstars256 - Auto Night-mode for Linux.
  • fancontrol-guistars108 - GUI for fancontrol which is part of lm_sensors.

    • Customization

    Themes

  • Cantastars48 - A flat design theme for KDE Plasma desktop.
  • Darkine KDEstars36 - Theme for KDE Plasma 5 desktop, SDDM and more.
  • Qogirstars86 - A flat design theme for KDE Plasma desktop.
  • Layanstars139 - A flat design theme for KDE Plasma desktop.
  • Hellostars191 - A compilation of various color-schemes, themes, icons and more for the KDE Plasma desktop. It is unopinionated, putting you in charge.
  • McMojavestars177 - A MacOSX Mojave like theme for KDE Plasma desktop.

    • Applications

    System Administration

  • Krusader - An advanced twin panel (commander style) file manager for KDE 📌.

    • Applications

    Education

  • KTurtle - An educational programming environment that aims to make learning how to program as easy as possible 📌.
  • LabPlot - Interactive graphing and analysis of scientific data 📌.

    • Customization

    Qt and GTK+ Applications Appearance

  • Breeze10stars76 - A Windows 10 style windows decoration for KDE Plasma.
  • SierraBreezestars335 - OSX-like window decoration for KDE Plasma written in C++.
  • Akava-Kvstars180 - User oriented Kvantum theme for KDE.
  • BreezeBlurredstars181 - A fork of KDE Breeze window decoration written in Qt C++.
  • BreezeEnhancedstars96 - A fork of KDE Breeze decoration with additional options.
  • KDE-Rounded-Cornersstars163 -

    • Customization

    Scripts

  • Grid-Tiling-Kwinstars758 - A kwin script that automatically tiles windows.
  • Kröhnkitestars853 - A dynamic tiling extension for KWin.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Applications

Utilities & Tools

  • KWin-lowlatencystars353 - An attempt to reduce latency and stuttering in the popular KWin compositor used in KDE.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Sep 23rd - Sep 29th, 2019
item.description:
Applications

Internet & Networking

  • GSConnect - A complete implementation of KDE Connect especially for GNOME Shell with Nautilus, Chrome and Firefox integration.
  • Firefox KDE - Standalone web browser from mozilla.org with OpenSUSE patch, integrate better with KDE.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • KMix - A sound channel mixer and volume control 📌.

    • Customization

    Themes

  • Breath - Breath Theme for Manjaro Linux (Plasma 5).

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
Articles

  • Kai Uwe's Blog - Stories of a Plasma developer.

    • Applications

    Internet & Networking

  • Konversation - A user-friendly Internet Relay Chat (IRC) client built on the KDE Platform 📌.

    • Applications

    Graphics & Imaging

  • Okular - A universal document viewer 📌.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Applications

Utilities & Tools

  • KRename - A utility to rename multiple files 📌.

    • Customization

    Icons

  • Antu - A smooth icon theme designed for Plasma Desktop.
  • Zafirostars283 - Minimalist icons created with the flat-desing technique, utilizing washed out colors and always accompanied by white. The priority is simplicity.

    • Customization

    Cursors

  • Capitainestars758 - An x-cursor theme inspired by macOS and based on KDE Breeze.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Customization

KCM Modules and Systems

  • kded_rotationstars43 - A small, hacky KDED module for handling automatic screen rotation on tablets and hybrid laptops.

    • Customization

    Qt and GTK+ Applications Appearance

  • breeze-gtkstars43 - A GTK Theme Built to Match KDE's Breeze 📌.

    • Applications

    Internet & Networking

  • Konqueror - Uses the KHTML rendering engine (and optionally Webkit) so it supports the latest web standards such as HTML5, JavaScript, CSS3, and others 📌.
  • Qt WebBrowser - Qt WebBrowser is a browser for embedded devices developed using the capabilities of Qt and Qt WebEngine.
  • KGet - A versatile and user-friendly download manager 📌.
  • KTorrent - A BitTorrent application which allows you to download files using the BitTorrent protocol 📌.
  • Plasma-browser-integration - A suite of new features which make Firefox, Chrome and Chromium-based browsers work with your desktop 📌.
  • KRDC - A client application that allows you to view or control a desktop session on another machine that is running a compatible server (VNC & RDP) 📌.
  • Akregator - Enables you to follow news sites, blogs and other RSS/Atom-enabled websites 📌.
  • KNetworkManager - A KDE client for the back end NetworkManager software 📌.

    • Applications

    Graphics & Imaging

  • Gwenview - A fast and easy to use image viewer by KDE 📌.
  • Spectacle - An application for capturing desktop screenshots 📌.
  • KolourPaint - A simple painting program to quickly create raster images. It is useful as a touch-up tool and simple image editing tasks 📌.
  • Krita - Painting tool designed for concept artists, illustrators, matte and texture artists, and the VFX industry 📌.
  • digiKam - Professional Photo Management with the Power of Open Source 📌.
  • KColorChooser - A simple application to select the color from the screen or from a pallete 📌.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • Amarok - Amarok is a powerful music player for Linux, Unix and Windows with an intuitive interface 📌.
  • Elisa - A music player developed by the KDE community that strives to be simple and nice to use 📌.

    • Applications

    Office & Productivity

  • Calligra - Includes efficient and capable office components 📌.
  • Kate - A multi-document, multi-view text editor by KDE 📌.
  • KWrite - A text editor by KDE, based on the KDE Frameworks editor component 📌.

    • Applications

    System Administration

  • Dolphin - File manager included in the KDE desktop 📌.
  • Discover - Intended for users and distros where the terminal isn't the optimal solution for installation of apps and add-ons or updates 📌.
  • Konsole - Terminal emulator included in the KDE desktop 📌.
  • Yakuake - A drop-down terminal emulator based on KDE's Konsole technology 📌.
  • KSystemLog - A system log viewer tool 📌.
  • Sweeper - Sweeper helps to clean unwanted traces the user leaves on the system and to regain disk space removing unused temporary files 📌.

    • Applications

    Utilities & Tools

  • Ark - Archiving Tool 📌.
  • KFind - A standalone search tool, launched by KRunner or from your menu. It is also integrated into Konqueror as "Find File" in the "Tools" menu 📌.
  • KFontview - An application to view and install different types of fonts 📌.
  • KDE Wallet Manager - Manage the passwords on KDE systems. The KDE wallet subsystem allows access and password management of every application that integrates with the KDE wallet 📌.

    • Applications

    Development & Programming

  • KDevelop - A cross-platform IDE for C, C++, Python, QML/JavaScript and PHP 📌.
  • Kompare - A diff/patch frontend 📌.
  • Umbrello - UML Modeller is a Unified Modelling Language (UML) diagram program based on KDE Technology 📌.
  • Okteta - Hex Editor 📌.

    • Customization

    Extensions

  • Latte-Dockstars847 - Latte is a dock based on Plasma frameworks that provides an elegant and intuitive experience for your tasks and plasmoids 📌.

    • Customization

    Scripts

  • kwin-tilingstars876 - Tiling script for kwin.

    • Documentation

  • KDE Wikis - The KDE wikis are a source of information and documentation for the KDE desktop, applications, teams, events and more 📌.

    • Articles

  • KDE.news - The official KDE news website 📌.
  • Planet KDE - Blogs of KDE contributors 📌.

    • Communities

  • KDE Store - Official KDE Store for developers to share Plasma customizations 📌.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Applications

Internet & Networking

  • Otter Browser - Otter Browser aims to recreate the best aspects of the classic Opera (12.x) UI using Qt5.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Customization

Themes

  • Helium - A translucent theme for Plasma 5.
  • Materia KDEstars348 - A port of the popular GTK theme Materia for Plasma 5 desktop with a few additions and extras.

    • Customization

    Cursors

  • Bibata - Material Based Cursor Theme.

    • Applications

    Utilities & Tools

  • KeePassXC - Cross-platform community-driven port of Keepass password manager.
  • QtPass - A multi-platform GUI for pass.
  • Android File Transfer - Reliable MTP client with minimalistic UI.

    • Applications

    Development & Programming

  • Qt Designer - Qt tool for designing and building graphical user interfaces (GUIs) with Qt Widgets.

    • Articles

  • Nate Graham's Blog - Adventures in Linux and KDE.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Aug 13th - Aug 19th, 2018
item.description:
Articles

  • Phoronix - Phoronix KDE News Archives.
  • Nico's Blog - Programmer from Germany that is working on KDE.

    • Communities

  • Kreddit - KDE Community on Reddit.
  • Stack Overflow - Questions tagged with kde.

    • Documentation

  • ArchWiki - Arch Linux KDE Wiki.
  • Gentoo Wiki - Gentoo KDE Wiki.

item.title: francoism90/awesome-kde Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Customization

Themes

  • Adapta KDEstars458 - A port of the popular GTK theme Adapta for Plasma 5 desktop with a few additions and extras.
  • Arc KDEstars742 - A port of the popular GTK theme Arc for Plasma 5 desktop with a few additions and extras.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • SMPlayer - Media player with built-in codecs that can play virtually all video and audio formats.
  • Kdenlive - A non-linear video editor for Linux using the MLT video framework.

    • Applications

    Internet & Networking

  • qBittorrent - An advanced BitTorrent client programmed in C++, based on Qt toolkit and libtorrent-rasterbar.

    • Customization

    Icons

  • Papirusstars4.2k - Material icon theme, initially based on Paper.
